_comment: Committed regression budgets for recall-bench (#9956), mirroring memperf/budgets.json. The runner compares MEASURED per-SearchMode rows against these and exits non-zero when a hard budget is crossed; a skipped (unmeasured) row never fails a budget. Numbers are the deterministic-embedding pipeline baseline at the 1k tier with headroom — calibrated AFTER the service.ts ranking fix (pure-vector candidates + count-not-limit pool), so reintroducing the dropped-candidate rerank (document-vector back to ~0.715) trips the document-vector floor. They catch ranking/weight/fail-open regressions, not production embedding quality (see README). 'null' is never conflated with a measured 0. The same floors also pass the (easier) smoke tier.
